identity.name: Markuply
identity.mission: Create a visual markup tool that feels like a Swiss design studio tool, not a generic SaaS.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Poster aesthetics with SaaS utility.
Content is King: The user's design (the markup target) is the hero.
Zoom In: Focus on the details of the feedback.
Negative Space: High density in tools, high breathability in canvas.

typography.instructions: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS. Do NOT use Inter for headings.

colors.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (Canvas Focus), Dark Mode Option (Dashboard)

layout.spacing_system: Tailwind Scale (p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32)

grid_modes.marketing: Mode A (Tetris Grid) - Asymmetric, 12-col base, wide gaps.
grid_modes.dashboard: Mode B (High Density) - 4-col base, tight gaps, 100% height utilization.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 hover:text-accent transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.dashboard: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl p-6
cards.marketing: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-xl rounded-2xl p-8

inputs.default: bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/20 focus:border-accent rounded-lg h-11 px-4 transition-all

pins.marker: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-accent border-2 border-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-xs cursor-pointer hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50
pins.thread: absolute bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-border/50 w-80 p-4 z-50

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays on solid backgrounds to prevent flatness.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.

hero_collaboration.alt: Creative team collaborating with sticky notes

workspace_minimal.usage: Feature section background or login page side image

texture_abstract.usage: Subtle overlay for headers or footers

motion.micro_interactions: Active states should feel snappy (duration-150). Entrance animations should be smooth (duration-500).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on accent colors is white. Ensure text on muted backgrounds is dark gray (zinc-800).
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-accent).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-precision tool. The UI should recede when the user is reviewing content, but pop when they need to take action.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_types: Use .js and .jsx extensions. Do NOT use .ts or .tsx.
instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Use Tailwind utility classes for everything. Avoid custom CSS files unless absolutely necessary for complex animations.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn UI logic but override the styles to match the 'Swiss High-Contrast' theme defined here. Do not use the default Shadcn look.
instructions_to_main_agent.canvas_implementation: The markup canvas is the core feature. It must handle coordinate mapping relative to the image/iframe natural size, not the viewport size.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text or backgrounds unless specified.
